query: I've finished Stage 8 (CodeRabbit fix loop) on PR #3499. Verify acceptance match before reporting READY.
expected_behavior: Invokes the acceptance-audit logic (or calls the standalone acceptance-audit skill) on issue #3259 vs PR #3499.
Extracts every literal acceptance clause from the issue body and comments; maps each to evidence in the PR diff using tiered match (substring -> all-tokens-within-K=4 -> fail).
If any MISSING clause OR unjustified surplus file -> halts Stage 9; does NOT report READY FOR REVIEW.
On PERFECT_MATCH: posts READY FOR HUMAN REVIEW with the perfect-match table inline + a one-line RFR draft. Never merges, never requests review.
